Jay Leno thinks he's spotted the new Johnny Carson—and he's not on broadcast TV. *    "Joe Rogan is the new Johnny Carson," he says. There's no FCC to step in and say what you say and can't say, so you really do get an unfiltered idea of what everybody thinks. recentArticles.title: Jason Momoa Joined by His Two Kids & Girlfriend Adria Arjona at 'Supergirl' Premiere in London - Just Jared
recentArticles.snippet: # Jason Momoa Joined by His Two Kids & Girlfriend Adria Arjona at ‘Supergirl’ Premiere in London. **Jason Momoa** has the support of his loved ones at his big event! The 46-year-old actor was joined by his two kids – son **Nakoa-Wolf**, 17, and daughter **Lola**, 18 – at the premiere of his new movie ***Supergirl*** on Thursday (June 18) held at Leicester Square in London, England. For the premiere, **Jason** sported a charcoal-gray suit, but soon took off his blazer to show off his buff muscles. His kids coordinated in black outfits. Also joining **Jason** at the premiere was his girlfriend **Adria Arjona**, who wore a plunging red dress. Hours before the *Supergirl* premiere, **Jason** rolled up in a motorcycle as he attended the Lobo Bike Stunt Photocall at the Marble Arch. ***Browse through the gallery for more photos of Jason Momoa at the Supergirl premiere…***. Posted To:Celebrity Babies Event Photos Jason Momoa Lola Momoa Nakoa-Wolf Momoa Supergirl.

recentArticles.title: Jack Savoretti on 'leaning into a midlife crisis' - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Jack Savoretti on 'leaning into a midlife crisis'. Twenty years since his debut, Jack Savoretti, who lives near Chipping Norton in Oxfordshire, says he was "very prepared for nobody really caring" about his ninth album, We Will Always Be The Way We Were. Ahead of his autumn tour across Europe and the UK, the singer talks about writing songs for "the mothers and the fathers in the world" and his first collaboration with long-time friend KT Tunstall. Savoretti compares choosing the theme of the album to "a bit like leaning into a midlife crisis". "As great as the music is right now, there's not much that I listen to that I relate to. "I don't know if there's much music for all the mothers and the fathers in the world, especially for men," he says. "I really wanted to make an album that was useful to anybody in the afternoon of life.".
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞主要報導歌手Jack Savoretti的新專輯與創作理念，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Carson Daly has career advice for son Jackson: ‘Become an electrician' - NBC New York
recentArticles.snippet: TODAY host Carson Daly and his wife Siri are about to hit a milestone with their oldest son, Jackson. “I think the key to parenthood for me, for fatherhood, is trying every single day how to figure out how to slow the hands of time,” Daly said at the the TODAY dads’ annual Father’s Day event at Swingers Crazy Golf in New York City. In two years now when he’s a freshman in college, the entire educational process of how or what he’s supposed to get out of a four-year university experience is completely changing in real-time.”. He said that Jackson “might benefit more from majoring in prompts of AI, learning how to use the technology to better a career.” He paused and added, “I’m trying to get him into a trade. I’m going to get an awesome condo right down the street, and you and I are going to have a great freshman year!’” Carson joked.
recentArticles.summary: 美國主持人Carson Daly分享了他對兒子未來職業規劃的看法，建議他考慮AI或技職，此資訊與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: MONSTA X’s Minhyuk Explores Love And Longing In New Single, ‘Reaching’ - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # MONSTA X’s Minhyuk Explores Love And Longing In New Single, ‘Reaching’. MONSTA X member Minhyuk has unveiled his new solo digital single, "Reaching," a sweet pop-rock ballad centered on love and deep connections. K-indie singer-songwriter Hyun-sang Ha penned and composed the track, specifically envisioning Minhyuk and his fans, hoping their sentiments would "reach him." Minhyuk's soft yet husky vocals beautifully intertwine with electric guitar riffs, steady drums, and acoustic melodies, evoking profound yearning and sincerity. Its "boyfriend-coded" music video shows Minhyuk in a tranquil forest with his guitar, a stark contrast to his previous EDM track "Ongshimi." This release highlights a surprisingly gentle, emotional facet of the energetic idol, perfectly resonating with his fanbase. Minhyuk of MONSTA X has released a new solo digital single, “Reaching,” a sweet message about love and exploring those connections. Minhyuk of MONSTA X’s new track “Reaching” is available on all streaming platforms.

recentArticles.title: MONSTA X’s Minhyuk Explores Love And Longing In New Single, ‘Reaching’ - Yahoo News Malaysia
recentArticles.snippet: # MONSTA X’s Minhyuk Explores Love And Longing In New Single, ‘Reaching’. Minhyuk of MONSTA X has released a new solo digital single, “Reaching,” a sweet message about love and exploring those connections. While Ha was writing the song, he thought about how it would feel to be a fan of someone like Minhyuk, and how fans would hope “those feelings would reach him.” So, he gifted the handsome vocalist the song, saying in a press release, “I hope this song becomes a gift for Minhyuk and for anyone who listens.”. It’s a song about longing, wanting to reach out to them, and declaring that love. It’s the perfect song for a sweet, romantic comedy. After listening to “Reaching” and watching the video, it’s no surprise that Ha wrote the song in the eyes of Minhyuk’s fans. Minhyuk of MONSTA X’s new track “Reaching” is available on all streaming platforms.

recentArticles.title: Exclusive | Gavin Newsom ‘preparing’ to release long-delayed tax returns amid DOJ probe - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: Gavin Newsom has pledged to publicly release all his tax returns as governor in a dramatic development in the ongoing Department of Justice probe into his family’s finances. Newsom’s office said Friday it is “working to prepare” the governor’s tax returns spanning his current term in office as federal officials reportedly investigate his wife Jennifer Siebel Newsom’s finances and other individuals close to the governor. Newsom previously pledged to release annual tax returns during his 2018 campaign for governor, calling it a “moral duty” in what was viewed as a shot at President Donald Trump, who broke tradition by declining to voluntarily release his returns. **California Post Newsletters**: Sign up here! The Newsoms’ family fortune —which includes a $9 million estate in posh Marin County, another $3.7 million home in Fair Oaks and a sprawling wine empire — has been the subject of scrutiny since sources revealed this week that Siebel Newsom’s taxes are one focus of multiple federal probes surrounding the governor.
recentArticles.summary: 加州州長Gavin Newsom因司法部對其家族財務的調查，正準備公開其延遲已久的稅務紀錄。

recentArticles.title: Ye San Antonio concert tickets release Friday on Ticketmaster - USA Today
recentArticles.snippet: # Ye San Antonio concert tickets release Friday on Ticketmaster. June 18, 2026, 11:47 p.m. ET. Tickets for Ye’s upcoming San Antonio concert are set to go on sale to the general public, according to Ticketmaster. The Grammy-winning artist, formerly known as Kanye West, is scheduled to perform at the Alamodome on July 4, with a 9 p.m. CT start time. Presale access opened earlier on Thursday, June 18, for fans, according to Alamodome, while general ticket sales begin at 10 a.m. CT/9 a.m. MT on Friday, June 19, for fans hoping to attend the Independence Day show. The San Antonio stop is part of a limited U.S. tour and marks one of the artist’s few scheduled performances in the country. ## Ye tour 2026 schedule. * Friday, June 26: Tampa, Fla. * Saturday, July 4: San Antonio - Alamodome. ## Ye setlist 2026. Ye has a net worth of $400 million, according to Forbes.

recentArticles.title: mgk, bbno$, Dan + Shay & More: Best Moments from NXNE 2026 - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: From June 10-14, the festival was the biggest week for the Canadian music industry and the spot for one-of-a-kind music moments. mgk live at Hotel X for Billboard Canada Presents THE STAGE at NXNE. This year, the beloved Toronto music festival continued its partnership with **Billboard Canada,** featuring a string of one-of-a-kind live shows from emerging and established acts, along with top-tier events that celebrated the biggest names in the Canadian music scene. From Daniel Caesar's heartfelt tribute to his managers, Matthew Burnett and Jordan Evans, at Billboard Canada Managers to Watch to Vinny Cinquemani and Riley O’Connor being inducted into Billboard Canada’s first-ever Hall of Fame at Billboard Canada Power Players to a surprise moment from Canada's hottest band Angine de Poitrine, it was a major week of highlights for both the music industry and music fans. Fresh off gracing the cover of *Billboard Canada* and playing his biggest-ever headline show at RBC Amphitheatre, bbno$ took NXNE back in time, returning to the Drake Underground for a special Billboard Canada THE STAGE show limited to 200 superfans.

recentArticles.title: EVAN begins solo debut countdown with self-produced album 'RIDE or DIE' - allkpop
recentArticles.snippet: EVAN is ready to showcase his unique musical identity through his self-produced debut single. EVAN will release his first digital single, '**RIDE OR DIE**,' through major music platforms on June 22 at 6 PM KST. It includes the title track of the same name, “Ride or Die,” along with the B-side track “Overflow.”. Through the title track, EVAN expresses a longing for love while also conveying his heartfelt sincerity toward fans. According to his agency, EVAN’s steadily developed musical abilities serve as the foundation of the new release. “*His growth as an artist is reflected throughout the album*,” the agency said. “*Through a number of self-produced songs, he has demonstrated his potential as a producer*.”. EVAN took the lead in writing and composing every track on the single and also participated in the overall visual creative direction. A representative described the release as “an opportunity for fans to experience deeper musical satisfaction while allowing the general public to discover EVAN’s true artistic value.”.

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ Surpasses ‘Bohemian Rhapsody’ As Highest-Grossing Biopic of All Time - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: The film has surpassed *Bohemian Rhapsody*'s total gross with $358.6 million at the domestic box office and $553.3 million internationally. Jaafar Jackson as Michael Jackson in the 2026 biopic 'Michael.'. Michael Jackson’s biopic, *Michael*, has dethroned *Bohemian Rhapsody* to become the highest-grossing music biopic of all time, crossing $911.9 million worldwide as the Jaafar Jackson-starring film continues its global rollout. Directed by Antoine Fuqua and written by John Logan, the Lionsgate and Universal co-production has surpassed *Bohemian Rhapsody*‘s total gross with $358.6 million at the domestic box office and $553.3 million internationally — with Universal generating $540.5 million of the international total after acquiring foreign theatrical and ancillary rights. The film has set a string of records in addition to its overall gross — among them the largest global opening weekend ever for a music biopic, the highest-grossing domestic biopic of all time, and the most successful biopic ever in France, surpassing *La Vie en Rose*.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導麥可傑克森傳記電影《Michael》票房表現超越《波希米亞狂想曲》，成為史上最高票房音樂傳記片，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Michael Becomes Highest-Grossing Music Biopic in History - Pitchfork
recentArticles.snippet: # *Michael* Becomes Highest-Grossing Music Biopic in History. The film has reportedly brought in $911.9 million worldwide, surpassing 2018’s *Bohemian Rhapsody*. *Deadline* reports that the Antoine Fuqua-directed Michael Jackson biopic, which stars the late star’s nephew Jaafar Jackson in the titular role, has brought in $911.9 million worldwide, surpassing 2018’s *Bohemian Rhapsody.* Both films, notably, were produced by the same man, Graham King. It’s the second-highest grossing film of 2026 thus far, following Universal, Illumination and Nintendo’s *The Super Mario Galaxy Movie*, and it's also the second-highest grossing biopic ever, behind Christopher Nolan’s 2025 film *Oppenheimer*. *Michael*, which has been approved by the Jackson estate, was originally slated for a 2025 release. *Michael*’s original ending reportedly focused on Chandler’s allegations, and the process of rewriting and reshooting a new third act, which follows the singer as he prepares for a massive solo tour in support of 1987’s *Bad*, cost between $10 million and $15 million.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導了麥可傑克森傳記電影《Michael》成為史上最高票房音樂傳記片，但內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.snippet: # After going TikTok viral, this rising pop star is coming to S.F. By Desiree Luo, Staff Writer. Madison Beer is bringing her tour to San Francisco to give the Bay Area its summer pop fix. The 27-year-old singer is scheduled to perform at the Bill Graham Civic Center on Tuesday, June 23, in support of “locket,” her third studio album following the Grammy-nominated “Silence Between Songs” in 2023. The track “bittersweet” went viral on TikTok and marked the singer’s first entry into the Billboard Hot 100, while “Make You Mine” earned her a second Grammy nod. After going TikTok viral, this rising pop star is coming to S.F. One of Oakland’s largest festivals returns with Grammy-winning headliner. recentArticles.title: Alicia Keys closes Knicks parade in custom black leather and a massive diamond chain - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: # Alicia Keys closes Knicks parade in custom black leather and a massive diamond chain. Alicia Keys wore a rhinestone-studded black leather Pelle Pelle jacket, matching leather pants and a diamond-encrusted Ruff Ryders chain to close the Knicks parade at City Hall on Thursday, paying tribute to her hometown team and its historic championship. The Manhattan-born Grammy winner, 45, performed “New York State of Mind” and her and Jay-Z’s 2009 anthem “Empire State of Mind” for the crowd, as exclusively reported by Page Six earlier this week. The brand’s For The City of Knicks jacket, created in partnership with Allan Houston’s FISLL social-impact brand, is currently available in a limited-edition women’s cropped version for $1,675. But the lifelong Knicks fan wasted no time celebrating afterward, sharing videos of fans singing “Empire State of Mind” on the streets and writing on Instagram, “It’s a New York moment!!!!!!

recentArticles.title: CNN’s All Access Subscription Launches on Prime Video in the U.S. - CNN Press Site
recentArticles.snippet: ### CNN’s All Access Subscription Launches on Prime Video in the U.S. **NEW YORK, NY – (June 18, 2026)** **–** CNN announced today that its All Access streaming subscription is now available on Prime Video in the U.S. All Amazon customers are now able to sign up for a robust content lineup including 24/7 global live news channels that feature CNN’s U.S. and international programming, premium original content from CNN Originals including CNN Original Series and award-winning CNN Films, CNN live events, breaking news coverage and exclusive video-on-demand programming. In addition to CNN’s 24/7 live global news and premium original content, subscribers will have access to marquee programming from CNN celebrating the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence, including **Independence Eve Live with Anderson Cooper and Andy Cohen** on July 3 and **The Fourth in America** on July 4, featuring CNN anchors and correspondents, live music performances and an exclusive fireworks spectacular from all over the country.

recentArticles.title: One of Oakland’s largest festivals returns with Grammy-winning headliner - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # One of Oakland’s largest festivals returns with Grammy-winning headliner. One of Oakland’s largest festivals is bringing several Grammy-recognized musicians to the Town. LakeFest Oakland will return to Lake Merritt for its seventh year on Saturday, June 27, featuring R&B singer-songwriters Eric Bellinger and VEDO as headliners. Bellinger won a Grammy for his work on Chris Brown’s 2011 album “F.A.M.E.,” but has also written music for Usher and Justin Bieber. Meanwhile, Vedo, who rose to fame on Season 4 of “The Voice,” earned a Grammy nod for songwriting contributions to Brown’s 2022 single “WE (Warm Embrace).”. This year’s LakeFest spans three stages, with a new “You Got Praise” Gospel Stage, which will showcase a gospel choir sing-off competition, dance groups and comedians. In tandem with the Gospel Stage is the Praise Marketplace, just one piece of the festival’s vendor landscape that comprises more than 200 food trucks and retailers. Desiree Luo is an intern at the San Francisco Chronicle on the Datebook team.

recentArticles.title: Next year to be Apple’s ‘biggest product year’ ever, here’s what’s coming - 9to5Mac
recentArticles.snippet: # Next year to be Apple’s ‘biggest product year’ ever, here’s what’s coming. Apple reportedly has 15+ new products launching this fall, but according to *Bloomberg’s* Mark Gurman, 2027 will be even bigger for the company. ## Apple products rumored for 2027 include six new iPhones, several AI wearables, and more. In his latest appearance on TBPN, Mark Gurman has made a big claim about Apple’s 2027 lineup. He said, “2027 is going to be Apple’s biggest product year in its history.”. For starters, 2027 could be the first year that Apple ships six new iPhone models:. * **Early 2027**: iPhone Air 2, iPhone 18, iPhone 18e. It’s expected to be a larger, more powerful version of the forthcoming HomePad. New M6-based products are expected next year too, including a next-gen iPad Pro, MacBook Air, and likely several other Macs. Apple is expected to have new Apple Watch models next year too, and potentially a variety of other products not yet known.

recentArticles.title: You won't ever guess who NBA champion Jalen Brunson listens to before games - sportingnews.com
recentArticles.snippet: Jalen Brunson has to make sure this artist is in his ear before every game. Brunson is fresh off a historic accomplishment with the New York Knicks, as they clinched the franchise's first NBA championship in 53 years. The Knicks star is letting fans into his pregame routine, which involves listening to this artist before each game. He shared that the routine began way before he was a part of the Knicks and that it actually started on the court of his alma mater, Villanova University. After he clinched two titles for Villanova, one in 2016 and another in 2018, he added it as part of his routine. "We end up winning, and then it happened again, so I was like 'Oh, this might be a thing,'" Brunson said. "Then we kept winning and winning, and we won a national championship," Brunson continued. Autumn Hawkins is a freelance writer with The Sporting News.

recentArticles.title: Trump delays Jay Clayton's nomination for intel director to try to push Congress on voting bill - The Washington Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Trump delays Jay Clayton's nomination for intel director to try to push Congress on voting bill. President Donald Trump says he’s delaying Jay Clayton’s nomination to lead the U.S. intelligence community in a bid to force Congress to act on a voter ID bill that currently lacks enough support for passage. U.S. President Donald Trump arrives to attend a musical interlude before a gala dinner as part of the G7 summit, in Evian-les-Bains, France, Tuesday June 16, 2026. (Ludovic MARIN/Pool Photo via AP). EVIAN-LES-BAINS, France — President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that he’s delaying Jay Clayton’s nomination to lead the U.S. intelligence community in a bid to force Congress to act on a voter ID bill that currently lacks enough support for passage.

recentArticles.title: Rosalía Praises Toronto During 'Lux' Concert: ‘You’ve Always Had My Back’ - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: The singer brought her Lux tour to Scotiabank Arena this weekend (June 13) for her sole Canadian date, a sold-out show marking her third time performing in Toronto. The acclaimed Spanish singer brought her latest trek to Canada over the weekend (June 13) for a singular date at Scotiabank Arena, marking her third time performing in the city. She praised the city for having welcomed her with open arms during her last two tours for *El Mal Querer* and *Motomami*, and expressed her gratitude to be back. "I do this show with all the love that I have and I hope that we can leave something in this show that you might be able to take home with you.". She balanced out the tranquil moments of the *Lux* songs with the brash energy of *Motomami*, as well as a techno break at the end of the Bjork and Yves Tumor-assisted “Berghain," swapping out her white cloak and veil for a dark outfit and a headpiece with horns.

recentArticles.title: New Queer Movies I'm Watching In Theaters This Weekend - IGN Southeast Asia
recentArticles.snippet: # New Queer Movies I'm Watching In Theaters This Weekend. ### It's a new Barbenheimer matchup for LGBTQIA+ folks this weekend. But seriously, there are two big releases happening this weekend you should be aware of: Leviticus and Girls Like Girls. Leviticus is a horror film that tackles homophobia in a new, intense way we haven't seen before, while Girls Like Girls is a much lighter romantic flick, based on Hayley Kiyoko's 2023 book and her music. Directed by Adrian Chiarella, the new queer horror film stars Joe Bird as Naim, a teenager living in a small, religious town. Chiarella’s story about gay youth being punished for simply being the way they are is emotional and thoughtful while also simply working well as a horror story, blending the real-life prejudices that inspired it with the supernatural curse laid upon its characters in a highly effective manner.". It's a sweet tribute to Hayley's coming out ballad in 2015, Girls Like Girls, which expanded into a novel in 2023 with the same name, and now this film in 2026!
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導介紹了兩部新的酷兒電影《Leviticus》和《Girls Like Girls》，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Jason Derulo Sounds Off on Backlash Over His Living Room Shark Tank - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: # Jason Derulo Sounds Off on Backlash Over His Living Room Shark Tank. ## Jason Derulo I Gave the Sharks More Room Than They Had Before! Video: Jason Derulo Sounds Off on Backlash Over His Living Room Shark Tank. **Jason Derulo** hears the backlash about the shark tank he has in his living room ... We caught up with the singer in L.A. Thursday, who said his sharks have more space now than they did in the aquarium he bought them from. That being said, JD promises he's listening to the criticism and trying to find the best way forward. ICYMI, Jason caught a lot of heat after he showed streamer **N3ON**the circular tank in the floor of his Tarzana, CA, home. Video: Jason Derulo Shows off Fancy Shark Tank To Streamer N3on. Based on what Jason told us, the jury's out on whether he's keeping the sharks or finding them a better home than his living room.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，主要報導歌手Jason Derulo回應關於其客廳鯊魚缸的爭議與批評。

recentArticles.title: ABC World News Tonight with David Muir Full Broadcast - June 18, 2026 - Modern Ghana
recentArticles.snippet: # ABC World News Tonight with David Muir Full Broadcast - June 18, 2026. Aaron Katersky was on the scene in lower Manhattan as an estimated 2 million fans joyfully filled the streets for the Knicks' ticker-tape parade celebrating the team's first NBA title in 53 years, and Matt Rivers has the latest on the chaotic scene in Times Square after gunfire erupted just hours after the parade ended; Faith Abbey has details on the severe weather fueled by remnants of Tropical Storm Arthur that triggered flash flood emergencies in parts of the Gulf Coast while a separate system spawned destructive tornadoes in the Midwest, and Lee Goldberg has the forecast; Mary Bruce reports on the U.S. lifting its blockade on Iranian ports, freeing ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz for 109 days, and on Vice Pres. Vance defending the deal despite questions over financial benefits for Iran; and more on tonight's broadcast of World News Tonight with David Muir. ABC World News Tonight with David Muir delivers the news that matters most.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導為ABC世界新聞的完整播報內容，涵蓋了紐約尼克隊奪冠遊行、時報廣場槍擊案、惡劣天氣及美國解除對伊朗港口封鎖等事件，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Michael: How To Watch Jaafar Jackson’s Film Online in India; Here Is the Streaming Platform, Price, Dubs, and More - IGN India
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael: How To Watch Jaafar Jackson’s Film Online in India; Here Is the Streaming Platform, Price, Dubs, and More. ### Moonwalk through the life and legacy of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, from home. The biographical film Michael, based on the life of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, is now available to watch at home. The film is based on the life of the legendary singer and dancer, following his journey from his early days as the lead vocalist of the Jackson Five to his rise as a global superstar. Following its theatrical run, the film is now available to rent and buy online in India. The film tells the story of Michael Jackson’s life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world.
